name: Gauntlets of Rage
description: You gain the power of never-ending fury. After you make a melee weapon attack, you automatically enter a special fury for 1 minute. While furious, you can't cast spells, can't verbally communicate, and are immune to the {@condition charmed} and {@condition frightened} conditions. Each time you deal damage, you regain {@dice 2d8} hit points and may immediately remove a condition you currently suffer from or end this fury.
